title: A PRODUCTIVE NIGHT
subtitle: The Suite · 10:47 PM · Marisol is Up
epigraph_upright: Marisol drove up this afternoon. The DAT bag is on the lounge couch where she dropped it. Reggie is going to call at some point — he said he would, last month, and Reggie keeps his word. Davey's CUE 14 has been on the timeline for nine days. The young editor is at the door again. Tonight is the kind of night the suite has been almost having since '99.
epigraph_reversed: Marisol falls asleep before you ask. Reggie's call goes to the answering machine. Davey's cue is too long and you can't decide where to trim it. The young editor knocks. You do not answer.
scene_description: The suite is awake. Two episodes are within reach of advancing a state tonight. Marisol is asleep in the lounge — but sleep counts; she came up. The master reel has 0/6 ticks; this is a fresh night. The pomegranate on the desk has been there since '99. The kettle has been on for forty minutes.
direction_hint: Advance two episodes one state each. Sit with one cast/crew member (greet → listen → deliver → sit_with). Don't let the night close before you leap through a threshold.
opening_log_lines: 10:47 PM. Marisol is asleep in the lounge. The DAT bag is on the couch.
The console is on. The lamp is on. Davey's cue 14 is at -18 db.
The phone has not rung yet tonight. It will.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the pomegranate seeds rattle in their dish.
the cue is sitting at -18 db without anyone scrubbing.
the room is asking when tonight ends.
marisol wakes, sees the timeline hasn't moved, says nothing.

doubt_thresholds.label: elicia at the console, second pot of coffee.
she questions where to put the cue's downbeat.
she doesn't trust her own ear tonight.
the editor breaks at her own console.

notes: Standard-mode Priestess. Marisol is asleep in the lounge from start — she counts as present. Three episode-subjects are bound to their spaces (Door 2 Woman, Waitress, Keeper). Reggie calls turn 2; the New Collaborator knocks turn 3; Prof. Kang's postcard arrives turn 5. Win is 3 cast/crew connections + 2 episodes advanced + 1 full sit_with + leap.
ambient_pool: the pomegranate seeds have gone hard. the dish hums.
marisol breathes on the lounge couch in 4/4.
the cue 14 draft loops at -18 db. it has looped for an hour.
the answering machine blinks. seventeen messages. fourteen are hen's.
